metadata.name: Audit Employee Turnover Data and Trends

description: An operational auditor analyzes employee turnover data to identify potential systemic issues.

nodes.task_description: Obtain employee turnover data for the past two years from the HR system.

expected_outcome.expected: The auditor has the complete turnover dataset.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data by department, manager, and tenure to identify any hotspots or trends.

expected_outcome.expected: The analysis reveals that one specific department has a turnover rate three times higher than the company average.

nodes.task_description: Review the exit interview data for the high-turnover department to identify common themes and root causes.

expected_outcome.expected: The exit interview data points to poor management and a lack of career development as the primary reasons for leaving.
